title: Xtra Creamy Korean Tofu Stew
description: A lazy Sunday Korean dish featuring hoisin sauce and a sweet twist, this stew is a comforting and creamy blend of fermented and halal-friendly flavors. It is a traditional Jeolla dish with a modern twist.
instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the gochujang and hoisin sauce, stirring to combine.
Add the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and add the tofu, breaking it up into small pieces.
Add the chopped candy and stir to combine.
Simmer the stew for 20 minutes or until the flavors have melded together.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve hot.
